items.title: Grafana Rearchitects Loki with Kafka and Ships a CLI to Bring Observability Into Coding Agent
items.summaryShort: Grafana Rearchitects Loki with Kafka and Ships a CLI to Bring Observability Into Coding Agent. At GrafanaCON 2026 in Barcelona, Grafana Labs announced Grafana 13 with the new Loki Kafka-backed architecture at the ingestion layer and the AI

items.title: How Observability and Telemetry Can Enhance the Practice of Software Engineering
items.summaryShort: How Observability and Telemetry Can Enhance the Practice of Software Engineering. Observability must evolve with serverless, event-driven architectures.

items.title: Presentation: How to Build an Exchange: Sub Millisecond Response Times and 24/7 Uptimes in the Cloud
items.summaryShort: Presentation: How to Build an Exchange: Sub Millisecond Response Times and 24/7 Uptimes in the Cloud. Frank Yu shares Coinbase’s engineering philosophy for building resilient, fair, and fast financial exchanges.

items.title: Dropbox Collaborates with GitHub to Reduce Monorepo Size from 87GB to 20GB
items.summaryShort: Dropbox Collaborates with GitHub to Reduce Monorepo Size from 87GB to 20GB. Dropbox reduced its backend monorepo from 87GB to 20GB by optimizing Git delta compression in collaboration with GitHub.

items.title: Presentation: Panel: Building a Culture that Works
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Panel: Building a Culture that Works. The panelists share insights on evolving company culture.

items.title: Tesla drops Musk's $29B ‘interim' award after Delaware court restored larger pay package
items.summaryShort: Tesla drops Musk's $29B ‘interim' award after Delaware court restored larger pay package. The company is following through on its promise to not let Musk "double dip" if he won his appeal to restore Tesla's 2018 compensation package,

items.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags
items.summaryShort: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags. WhatsApp is rolling out prepaid phone recharges to its 500 million users in India via PayU.

items.title: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch
items.summaryShort: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch. Astronomers are turning to GPUs to find needles in the galactic haystack.
